name: xrpl-cloud
description: HTTP MCP client that connects to the StaticBit cloud XRPL server at https://xrpl.mcp.staticbit.ai. Read/prepare/submit transactions over HTTPS. Authenticates via OAuth 2.1 against auth.mcp.staticbit.ai (run /mcp to log in once). No binaries, no local server — the cloud bears the WebSocket load. Pair with xrpl-signer for the signing half of write flows.
